## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds locally
- [ ] Added a changeset (or N/A — no publishable-package changes)
- [ ] Updated relevant docs
- [ ] Screenshots (or N/A)
